rationale.R1.6: The user asked to polish the passage, making sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision the core responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: While editing, maintain appropriate hedging and avoid implying certainty beyond what the text establishes.
rationale.RX.2: Polishing should not intensify claims or add unwarranted generalizations about the methods or data.
rationale.RX.3: Scope must be limited to copyediting the provided text without restructuring sections or altering substantive content.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should avoid introducing misleading technical changes that could affect replication or interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Preserve original meanings, figures, and sources so revisions remain traceable to the provided text.
